subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! According to what hath been ascertained, thou hast journeyed unto Bishishvan, and the prolongation of this journey [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان از قرار معلوم بشیشوان تشریف برده اید و امتداد این سفر حذر از
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @wisdom [hikmat], @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @thankfulness; gratitude
